# Petroleum Hydrocarbons

**Summary**: Hydrocarbons derived from petroleum, including alkanes and aromatic compounds.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-oyehan|Oyehan, 2015]] analyzed the degradation of petroleum hydrocarbons in contaminated sites.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Detected extractable aromatics between 9.09 and 13.42 mg/kg in sediment samples. ([[2015-oyehan|Oyehan, 2015, p. 37]])
